name: meta ai -流程管理
description: Meta AI 图片生成全流程：导航 → 输入提示词 → 生成 → 批量下载高清图片 → 上传 OSS

nodes.label: 3 分析参考图生成提示词

params.prompt: 你是顶级视觉提示词工程师。请根据输入图片生成一条高质量英文 prompt。只输出英文，不要解释。

params.selector: body > div.min-w-0.flex.group\/sidebar-wrapper.min-h-svh.w-full > div.min-h-0.min-w-0.flex.h-dvh.w-dvw.overflow-hidden > div.min-h-0.min-w-0.flex.flex-col.grow.relative.overflow-hidden > div > div > div.pointer-events-none.relative.z-20.flex.w-full.shrink-0.flex-col.items-center.px-6.pb-3 > div.shadow-blur-elevation-01.rounded-32.relative.z-10.w-full.max-w-3xl.pointer-events-auto > div > div > div > div > div.group\/scroller.overflow-hidden.z-0.scrollbar-hide.relative.perspective-\[1px\].perspective-origin-top-right.transform-3d.overscroll-y-contain.flex.min-h-0.flex-1.flex-col.overflow-y-auto.-me-3.pe-3.mt-3 > div.flex.flex-col.relative.grow-1 > div > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div > div.outline-none.undefined > p

body > div.min-w-0.flex.group\/sidebar-wrapper.min-h-svh.w-full > div.min-h-0.min-w-0.flex.h-dvh.w-dvw.overflow-hidden > div.min-h-0.min-w-0.flex.flex-col.grow.relative.overflow-hidden > div > div > div.pointer-events-none.relative.z-20.flex.w-full.shrink-0.flex-col.items-center.px-6.pb-3 > div.shadow-blur-elevation-01.rounded-32.relative.z-10.w-full.max-w-3xl.pointer-events-auto > div > div > div > div > div.flex.shrink-0.items-center.gap-0.pt-3.md\:gap-1 > div.ms-auto.flex.items-center.gap-2 > div > button
